## What

A sentence on the change — bug fix, new tool, copy edit, anything.

## Why

Link an issue if there is one. If not, describe in a sentence what
problem this solves.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] If a new tool is being added, `src/lib/tools.ts` and `src/components/motionix/tool/tools/dynamic.tsx` are updated.
- [ ] If a new visual primitive is being added, it's used on the landing page or in some tool within this same PR. (Otherwise we'll delete in review.)

## Screenshots / recordings

Drag/drop here if visual.
